description.zh-cn: 极简主义电商主题：纯白留白、克制的黑白配色、细发丝线条与现代无衬线字体，去除一切多余装饰，让商品本身成为主角。适合服饰、家居、数码、设计师品牌等追求质感与高级感的店铺。
description.en: A minimalist e-commerce theme with clean white space, restrained black-and-white palette, hairline borders and a modern sans-serif typeface. Strips away decoration so the product itself takes center stage.
